name: TYPECAST
short_description: TYPECAST is a bullet hell where you type to shoot. Get swarmed by enemies, manage the chaos, and climb the leaderboards in this unique arcade experience.
detailed_description:
"One of the best games of the year! You owe it to yourself to play it." - Noclip

"Typecast offers a truly modernized arcade gameplay experience. It can be played forever, and can genuinely last as long as there is air in your lungs and hatred in your heart." - A Dedicated Fan

"Super simple arcade game that has been polished into the impossible." - Some Guy Who Left A Steam Review

"Please remove me from your mailing list." - A Press Outlet Who Will Remain Unnamed

Pure Arcade Bliss

No meta progression, no roguelike or roguelite elements, no nonsense. Meta progress your own brain as your skills increase and you climb the leaderboards.

Ultra Precise Movement

Your mouse is your character. Weave in and out of hordes of enemies with perfect precision!

Type To Shoot

Each enemy has a specific letter that you must type in order to destroy them. Be careful, typing the wrong key can have dire consequences!

Endless Onslaught

Enemies never stop coming. Fight them off for as long as you can and go for the high score!

Deep Mechanics

Use slow-mo, bombs, parries, and more to destroy your enemies and climb to the top of the leaderboards!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese
